rows.label: tev018401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev018401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Tobias about claiming
Miran resources.

rows.label: tev018401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev018401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Tobias if he's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev018401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Tobias about Mira.

rows.label: tev018401_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Tobias what he did
during the enemy attack.

rows.label: tev018401_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Tobias about Cauldros.

rows.label: tev018401_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Tobias about Cauldros.

rows.label: tev018401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Tobias about recent developments.

rows.label: tev018401_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Tobias about Cauldros.

rows.label: tev018401_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Tobias about recent developments.

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mira right now is kinda like San
Francisco before the gold rush.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0002
rows.name:
We know there are valuable resources
all around us, but most of them
haven't been claimed yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0003
rows.name:
While the rest of BLADE is off casually
performing missions, I'm gonna expand
FrontierNet and make a fortune![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Do you wanna get in on this
action? If so, I'm gonna need
every last credit you got.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh, and you'll only be a junior partner,
so you have to follow orders from me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I hear that goody-goody Kirsty is going
around to BLADEs who ain't been clued in
yet and teaching 'em all about FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Why can't she mind her own damn business, huh?
What if one of those little pukes beats me to a
prime FrontierNet spot and installs a probe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0012
rows.name:
And if she's such a freakin' expert, why doesn't
she go get rich herself instead of shooting
her mouth off about it to everyone else?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0018
rows.name:
If you spot a scenic viewpoint or unexplored
territory while you're out gallivanting around,
you better make sure I'm the first one you tell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0019
rows.name: ...Huh? What's my interest in those?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Money, ya dolt! What, ya think
I actually like staring at
nature-y crap all day? Pfffft.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0021
rows.name:
You set a research probe at a scenic viewpoint or
unexplored territory, and everyone logs on to check
the view out. Then I...er, WE pocket the ad revenue![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Here on Mira, a nice view
could be worth more than any
gemstone or precious metal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Me? Well let me ask you this—what good
would a washed-up engineer-turned-Pathfinder
like me be at a time like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0028
rows.name:
Not much, right? So while you were stompin' around
NLA firing guns in the air like a damn fool, I was
looking for more unexplored territories to exploit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0029
rows.name:
In fact, I found a real special
beach at the foot of those
cliffs in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0030
rows.name:
Sure am glad I got out when I did. Sounds
like that battle was a real nasty one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0035
rows.name:
Have you heard about what's at the
very tippy-top of Mount M'gando in
the northern part of Cauldros?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Well, I have! And I hear it's a
uniquely beautiful hot spring where
the area's nastiest monsters live.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0037
rows.name:
Sounds like a spot like that
could be worth big bucks, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0038
rows.name:
But that mountain's way too
dangerous. Even I ain't that greedy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG0039
rows.name:
Now if YOU want to take a shot at it, be my guest!
Just make sure to transfer your life savings to my
account first. I'll take care of it when you're dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG2001
rows.name:
Have you heard about what's at the
very tippy-top of Mount M'gando in
the northern part of Cauldros?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG2002
rows.name:
Well, I have! And I hear it's a
uniquely beautiful hot spring where
the area's nastiest monsters live.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG2003
rows.name:
Sounds like a spot like that
could be worth big bucks, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG2004
rows.name:
But that mountain's way too
dangerous. Even I ain't that greedy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG2005
rows.name:
Still, I bet you could pull it
off. Just be careful up there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG2010
rows.name:
Lately I've been busy looking for
something, and I had to prioritize
that over installing data probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG2011
rows.name:
...Huh? You wanna know
what I was looking for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG2012
rows.name:
Sorry, pal. Trade secret. Can't share
that with no one. Not even you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3001
rows.name:
I know you wouldn't believe it lookin' at me now,
but before the accident I was a handsome, young
engineer who was popular with all the ladies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3002
rows.name:
I spent two years on the White
Whale, working with the team
that made FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3003
rows.name:
We finally got it finished—and
yeah, I dunno if my contributions
ended up being worth much...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3004
rows.name:
But to this day, I'm proud to have been part of
the team that created it. That network found us
the Lifepoint Core and secured humanity's future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3009
rows.name:
We've been analyzing the data units our old teammates
left behind and using what we've learned to start
creating the next generation of FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3010
rows.name:
But this time, they had some crazy plan to make it
an intergalactic network! This is on a totally
different scale from what we were working on before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3011
rows.name:
Still, Kirsty and I just sit at our
terminals nodding and mm-hmming as if
we know what the hell we're doing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3012
rows.name:
Those bastards sure left us with
one hell of a parting gift.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_MSG3013
rows.name:
I dunno how far we'll get, but even if it
costs me every penny in the bank and the rest
of my life, I'm going to make this happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018401_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask about his time on the White Whale.
